height_to_width.desc: 主体高度/宽度（古典纪念性建筑不宜过扁）

depth_to_width.desc: 深度/宽度（宫殿/U型往往更深）

window_wall_ratio.desc: 窗洞占立面比例（古典立面实墙为主）

aiInstruction: Classical/monumental: MASS_MAIN with params.facade_profile=vertical_pilasters, wall_pattern=gradient, FOUNDATION plinth, ROOF with overhang, vertical bay FACADE_WINDOWS, DECOR_DETAIL cornice + column bands. Output proportion_hints.
